languages.original_text: {n}Turning to you, he smiles.{/n} "Rogue Trader, as you can see, my unification with my colleague is already proving fruitful. There are nuances to triasomia that we have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Повернувшись к вам, он расплывается в улыбке.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, как видите, наше {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}единение с коллегой{/d} уже приносит свои плоды. Есть нюансы триасомии, которые нам предстоит доработать, но, как вы знаете, мне даже проще экспериментировать на себе. Мне сложно описать ту экзальтацию, что я испытываю от воссоединения с дражайшим коллегой! Он жив благодаря вам!" {n}Манипулус довольно указывает на пустую точку в пространстве.{/n}

{n}Turning to you, he smiles.{/n} "Rogue Trader, as you can see, my {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unification with my colleague{/d} is already proving fruitful. There are nuances to triasomia that we have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

Есть нюансы триасомии, которые нам предстоит доработать, но, как вы знаете, мне даже проще экспериментировать на себе. Мне сложно описать ту экзальтацию, что я испытываю от воссоединения с дражайшим коллегой! Он жив благодаря вам!" {n}Манипулус довольно указывает на пустую точку в пространстве.{/n}

I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

There are nuances to triasomia that we have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Se gira hacia ti y sonríe.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, como puede ver, mi {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unificación con mi colega{/d} ya está dando frutos. Todavía quedan peculiaridades de la triasomía por refinar, pero como ya sabe, me es fácil experimentar conmigo mismo. ¡No tengo palabras para describir mi júbilo por reunirme con mi querido colega! ¡Está vivo, gracias a usted!». {n}El manipulus gesticula pletórico en dirección al aire.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to you, he smiles.{/n} "Rogue Trader, as you can see, my {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unification with my colleague{/d} is already proving fruitful. There are nuances to triasomia that we have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Se gira hacia ti y sonríe.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, como puede ver, mi {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unificación con mi colega{/d} ya está dando frutos. Todavía quedan peculiaridades de la triasomía por refinar, pero como ya sabe, me es fácil experimentar conmigo mismo. ¡No tengo palabras para describir mi júbilo por reunirme con mi querido colega! ¡Está vivo, gracias a usted!». {n}El manipulus gesticula pletórico en dirección al aire.{/n}

languages.text: {n}他转向你，露出了微笑。{/n}“行商浪人，如您所见，{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}我与同僚的结合{/d}已开始结出硕果。三相体之术尚有精微之处有待完善，但您也清楚，拿我自己做实验，终归要方便得多。我无法向您描述，能与我最亲密的同僚再度合为一体是何等崇高的感受！多亏了您，他才能活下来！”{n}这位操纵者兴高采烈地对着空气比划着。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to you, he smiles.{/n} "Rogue Trader, as you can see, my {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unification with my colleague{/d} is already proving fruitful. There are nuances to triasomia that we have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}他转向你，露出了微笑。{/n}“行商浪人，如您所见，{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}我与同僚的结合{/d}已开始结出硕果。三相体之术尚有精微之处有待完善，但您也清楚，拿我自己做实验，终归要方便得多。我无法向您描述，能与我最亲密的同僚再度合为一体是何等崇高的感受！多亏了您，他才能活下来！”{n}这位操纵者兴高采烈地对着空气比划着。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Il se tourne vers vous et sourit.{/n} « Comme vous pouvez le constater, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, l'{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unification avec mon collègue{/d} commence déjà à porter ses fruits. Il nous reste encore à affiner certaines nuances de la triasomia, mais comme vous le savez, je n'ai aucun mal à expérimenter sur moi-même. Vous n'imaginez pas à quel point je suis heureux d'être enfin réuni avec mon cher collègue ! Il est en vie grâce à vous ! » {n}D'un grand geste enthousiaste, le manipulus désigne un espace vide.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to you, he smiles.{/n} "Rogue Trader, as you can see, my {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unification with my colleague{/d} is already proving fruitful. There are nuances to triasomia that we have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Il se tourne vers vous et sourit.{/n} « Comme vous pouvez le constater, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, l'{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unification avec mon collègue{/d} commence déjà à porter ses fruits. Il nous reste encore à affiner certaines nuances de la triasomia, mais comme vous le savez, je n'ai aucun mal à expérimenter sur moi-même. Vous n'imaginez pas à quel point je suis heureux d'être enfin réuni avec mon cher collègue ! Il est en vie grâce à vous ! » {n}D'un grand geste enthousiaste, le manipulus désigne un espace vide.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Er dreht sich lächelnd zu dir um.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, wie Ihr sehen könnt, erweist sich die {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Vereinigung mit meinem Kollegen{/d} bereits als fruchtbar. Ich muss noch einige Nuancen der Triasomie optimieren, aber wie Ihr wisst, fällt es mir deutlich leichter, an mir selbst zu experimentieren. Ich kann das Hochgefühl kaum beschreiben, das ich angesichts der Wiedervereinigung mit meinem geschätzten Kollegen empfinde! Dank Euch lebt er!" {n}Der Manipulus macht eine erfreute Geste.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to you, he smiles.{/n} "Rogue Trader, as you can see, my {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unification with my colleague{/d} is already proving fruitful. There are nuances to triasomia that we have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Er dreht sich lächelnd zu dir um.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, wie Ihr sehen könnt, erweist sich die {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}Vereinigung mit meinem Kollegen{/d} bereits als fruchtbar. Ich muss noch einige Nuancen der Triasomie optimieren, aber wie Ihr wisst, fällt es mir deutlich leichter, an mir selbst zu experimentieren. Ich kann das Hochgefühl kaum beschreiben, das ich angesichts der Wiedervereinigung mit meinem geschätzten Kollegen empfinde! Dank Euch lebt er!" {n}Der Manipulus macht eine erfreute Geste.{/n}

languages.text: {n}彼は微笑む。鼻から血がにじむ。{/n}「ローグ・トレーダーよ、見てのとおり、私の同僚との統合は成功した。三位一体にはまだ洗練させなければならないニュアンスがあるが、君も気づいているように、自分自身に対する実験はすべて容易になった。大切な同僚と再会したときの高揚感といったら！」。{n}そう言いながら、彼は自分の顔の半分が苦悩の表情に歪み、もう半分が微笑んでいるのに気づかない。有機物の目から涙がこぼれる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to you, he smiles. Blood trickles from his nose.{/n} "Rogue Trader, as you can see, my unification with my colleague has been a success. There are nuances to the trinity that I have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague!" {n}As he says this, he fails to notice the way that half of his face twists in a grimace of suffering while the other half smiles. A tear escapes his organic eye.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sana dönerek gülümsüyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, gördüğünüz üzere {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}meslektaşımla olan bütünleşmem{/d} şimdiden meyvelerini veriyor. Üçyeközleştirmenin hâlâ düzeltmemiz gereken nüansları olsa da kendi üzerimde deney yapmak benim için çok daha kolay. Pek değerli meslektaşımla yeniden bir araya gelmekten duyduğum sevinci tarif edemem! Sizin sayenizde hayatta!" {n}Manipülus, boş havaya keyifle işaret ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to you, he smiles.{/n} "Rogue Trader, as you can see, my {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}unification with my colleague{/d} is already proving fruitful. There are nuances to triasomia that we have still to refine, but as you are aware, it is all the easier for me to experiment on myself. I cannot describe the exaltation I feel at being reunited with my dearest colleague! He is alive thanks to you!" {n}The Manipulus gestures delightedly at the empty air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sana dönerek gülümsüyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, gördüğünüz üzere {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}meslektaşımla olan bütünleşmem{/d} şimdiden meyvelerini veriyor. Üçyeközleştirmenin hâlâ düzeltmemiz gereken nüansları olsa da kendi üzerimde deney yapmak benim için çok daha kolay. Pek değerli meslektaşımla yeniden bir araya gelmekten duyduğum sevinci tarif edemem! Sizin sayenizde hayatta!" {n}Manipülus, boş havaya keyifle işaret ediyor.{/n}
